prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 9649→10796→10001→19898→10571，2024 年因出现不限选科专业组导致位次异常后移，2025 年回归至约 10571 名；近 3 年（剔除 2024 年异常值）位次在 10001–10796 区间波动，2025 年基准约 10571 名；该校在广西理科/物理类招生计划 2021 年 96 人、2022 年 99 人、2023 年 99 人、2024 年 104 人、2025 年 108 人，呈持续小幅扩招趋势；2026 年计划 110 人，较 2025 年再增 2 人，扩招约 1.85%，对竞争有轻微加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京化工大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从 2021 年第 62 位持续上升至 2026 年第 57 位，近年排名稳步提升，有助于增强学校整体吸引力；2026 年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及师德调查事件，未见明显负面舆情冲击；抖音热度排名第 7（高热），综合热度约 739 万，短视频曝光量高，反映报考关注度升温，可能加剧竞争；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获评 A，化学、材料科学与工程获评 A-，共 3 个 A- 及以上学科，化工与材料学科实力突出，与该校工科试验班等招生专业高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，与北化工科特色匹配；广西 2026 年高考总考生约 39.2 万人，较 2025 年增长约 3.3%，按近年比例估算物理类考生约 26.9 万人，考生规模扩大推高竞争；省控线（物理类本科批 370、特殊类型 495）近年基本稳定；北京化工大学位于北京，广西非其生源大省，近年该校在广西招生占比约 2%–3%，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026 年小幅扩招、软科排名持续上升、抖音高热关注度及广西考生总数增长等因素，预计 2026 年竞争较 2025 年略有加剧；预测最低位次约 10728 名，区间 10228–11228 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Science/Physics Category was approximately 9649→10796→10001→19898→10571. In 2024, due to the emergence of a subject-unrestricted major group, the ranking abnormally shifted backward, but returned to about 10571 in 2025. In the past 3 years (excluding the 2024 anomaly), the ranking fluctuated within the range of 10001–10796, with a baseline of about 10571 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for Science/Physics Category in Guangxi was 96 in 2021, 99 in 2022, 99 in 2023, 104 in 2024, and 108 in 2025, showing a continuous slight expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 110, an increase of 2 from 2025, about 1.85% expansion, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Chemical Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has steadily risen from 62nd in 2021 to 57th in 2026, enhancing the overall attractiveness of the school. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving a teacher ethics investigation incident, with no obvious negative public opinion impact. Its Douyin (TikTok) popularity ranks 7th (high heat), with a comprehensive heat of about 7.39 million, high short video exposure, reflecting increased attention for applications, which may intensify competition. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A, Chemistry and Materials Science and Engineering were rated A-, totaling 3 disciplines at A- or above. The chemical and materials disciplines are outstanding, highly correlated with the university's engineering experimental classes and other enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended, matching the engineering characteristics of Beijing University of Chemical Technology. In 2026, the total number of Guangxi college entrance examination candidates is about 392,000, an increase of about 3.3% from 2025. Estimated by recent proportions, Physics Category candidates are about 269,000, and the expansion of the candidate pool increases competition. The provincial control lines (Physics Category undergraduate batch 370, special type 495) have been basically stable in recent years. Beijing University of Chemical Technology is located in Beijing, and Guangxi is not its major source province. In recent years, the university's enrollment proportion in Guangxi is about 2%–3%, so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as historical ranking fluctuations, slight expansion in 2026, continuous rise in Soft Science ranking, high Douyin attention, and increase in Guangxi candidate numbers, competition in 2026 is expected to be slightly more intense than in 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 10728, with a range of 10228–11228.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 10728, range 10228–11228. If ranking is within the range, it is recommended to mainly fill Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors (Hongde Academy, Computer Class, etc.) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Advanced Materials, Green Chemistry, etc.) as safety options. If ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (e.g., within 10200), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors. If ranking is near the lower limit of the range (around 11200), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety.
